name: H. Davidson
tagline: Documentary stories from the edges of ordinary life — night shifts, small towns, slow recoveries.
bio: I've spent the last decade photographing the parts of daily life that rarely make the front page — night shifts, small towns, slow recoveries. My work sits somewhere between photojournalism and long-form documentary: I follow one story for as long as it takes to understand it.
quote: I'm not interested in the moment a story breaks. I'm interested in everything that happens after — that's where the real picture is.
